division_title: REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE
text: Provisions of this code which specify and govern application filing, fee assignment, penalty assessment, and issuance of license plates and registration certificates, shall be applicable to vehicles registered pursuant to this article.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3. REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE [4000 - 9808]
### Chapter 4. Permits to Nonresident Owners [6700 - 8204]
#### Article 4. Apportioned Registration [8050 - 8058]
##### § 8053

Provisions of this code which specify and govern application filing, fee assignment, penalty assessment, and issuance of license plates and registration certificates, shall be applicable to vehicles registered pursuant to this article.

*(Added by Stats. 1989, Ch. 533, Sec. 8.)*

subsections.text: Provisions of this code which specify and govern application filing, fee assignment, penalty assessment, and issuance of license plates and registration certificates, shall be applicable to vehicles registered pursuant to this article.
